title: ComSaf 300ml Glass Coffee Cups Set of 4, Clear Glass Coffee Cup with Big Handle, Borosilicate Glass Mug for Coffee Tea Milk Juice or Hot Cold Beverages, Crystal Drinking Glass for Birthday Party
features: Premium Quality: This coffee cup is made from food-grade borosilicate glass, lead-free and BPA-free; Lightweight yet durable for comfortable everyday use; Perfect as everyday glass cups, handling hot or cold drinks with ease; Dishwasher and microwave safe—heat milk or tea worry-free

Compact & Versatile: This coffee mugs set of 4 suits every drink from morning espresso to evening milk; With a compact 300ml capacity, these glass coffee mugs are ideal for coffee, cocoa or fresh juice—perfect for everyday moments.

Comfort Grip: These glass coffee mugs feature a sturdy ergonomic handle that stays cool to the touch, even with hot tea or coffee; Easy to lift and steady to hold, so you can enjoy every sip without worrying about heat or slips

Design & Protection: Modern and minimalist, this 300ml glass tea cup has a smooth rim, sleek body and sturdy handle; Packed with pearl cotton for safer delivery, it arrives intact with lower breakage risk than common foam packaging

Functional Gift: With timeless elegance and reliable quality, this set of 300ml cappuccino cups makes a thoughtful gift for family, friends or colleagues; Perfect for housewarmings, weddings, Thanksgiving or Christmas to share warmth and appreciation
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Smooth Rim Rounded and polished edge for a comfortable sip, no sharp feel on lips. Easy Grip Handle Wide ergonomic handle keeps your fingers relaxed, steady even with hot drinks. Lightweight Build Crafted from borosilicate glass, durable yet feather-light for daily use. Stable Flat Base Flat bottom design ensures the glass stands firm and steady on any surface.
